---
title: "Programme"
---

::: {.container-narrow}

The detailed programme will be announced closer to the workshop.

## Day 1 — Tuesday, 29 September 2026

| Time | Session |
|---|---|
| 09:30–10:00 | Registration and coffee |
| 10:00–10:15 | Welcome and opening remarks |
| 10:15–11:00 | Keynote lecture |
| 11:00–11:30 | Coffee break |
| 11:30–13:00 | Session 1 — Molecular generation and therapeutic design |
| 13:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Session 2 — Targets, mechanisms and disease models |
| 15:30–16:00 | Coffee break |
| 16:00–17:30 | Contributed talks / posters |
| 17:30–18:00 | Discussion |

## Day 2 — Wednesday, 30 September 2026

| Time | Session |
|---|---|
| 09:30–10:00 | Coffee |
| 10:00–10:45 | Keynote lecture |
| 10:45–11:15 | Coffee break |
| 11:15–12:45 | Session 3 — Cell-state responses and perturbation models |
| 12:45–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Session 4 — Multimodal and foundation models for biology |
| 15:30–16:00 | Coffee break |
| 16:00–17:00 | Panel discussion |
| 17:00–17:15 | Closing remarks |

:::
